copy.about: The History Arcadia's only bed & breakfast About the Home: Step into the heart of Arcadia, where our exclusive bed and breakfast is housed within the walls of a 101-year-old home. This isn't just a structure; it's a living archive of the town's history. As locals, we take pride in preserving the unique charm that each antique furnishing and creaky floorboard holds. The home stands as a testament to Arcadia's rich cultural legacy, inviting you to embark on a journey through time within its storied walls. About the Bed and Breakfast: Our commitment to reopening this cherished haven goes beyond business—it's a labor of love. We want to offer more than just accommodation; we aim to immerse you in the living history of our community. The decision to revive this bed and breakfast is rooted in a deep sense of community pride and a desire to share the cultural legacy embedded in every detail. As you cross the threshold, envision a warm embrace of hospitality that transcends time, where the past meets the present, and every stay adds a chapter to the ongoing story of Arcadia's exclusive bed and breakfast. Welcome to a place where the echoes of history resonate, and where each guest becomes a cherished part of our enduring tale. . Meet the team. We are a family owned business, locals from Desoto County! About us Kerry keiser Founder jake keiser Partner raven keiser General Manager
copy.roomsIntro: GuestROOMS We offer a variety of accommodations to meet the needs of our guests, from standard rooms to a full suite. Step into luxury in our historic rooms, where timeless elegance meets modern comfort. Each space is adorned with antique furnishings, offering a glimpse into the past. Enjoy the convenience of smart TVs and indulge in a stay that seamlessly blends history with contemporary indulgence. Your retreat in Arcadia awaits, where every detail is crafted for your comfort and delight.
copy.gallery: Gallery Relax at our historic bed and breakfast in Arcadia, Florida. From savory meals in our charming dining room to relaxing on the inviting front porch, every space is designed for comfort. The enchanting garden, adorned with a fire pit, invites quiet contemplation under the starlit sky. Enjoy a cup of tea in the sunlit Florida room. Each corner of our home is a canvas for creating memories and embracing the vibrant energy of Arcadia, making your stay a seamless blend of comfort and charm.
copy.reservation: RESERVATIONs Escape to the past in our historic home Reservations Click the button below to make a reservation. Book Your Stay Now Experience the unique history and location of our bed and breakfast. Indulge in an enchanting escape at our historic bed and breakfast in Arcadia, Florida. Immerse yourself in the elegance of a bygone era surrounded by antique charm. Centrally located, our inn is your gateway to the town's rich history and treasures. We invite you to embrace the past, create new memories, and fall in love with an experience uniquely our own. Your stay with us promises to be a journey through time, filled with warmth and the allure of Arcadia's fascinating history.
